---
title: "Projects"
---
::: {.page-nav}
[← Home](index.qmd){.nav-button}
[CV](cv.qmd){.nav-button}
[Contact](contact.qmd){.nav-button}
:::
## Featured Academic Projects

::: {.project-card}
### Lobster Land Stay & Play Analytics — Boston University

Built an analytics project to support a theme park's potential lodging and multi-day guest experience strategy. The project connected hospitality benchmarking with practical recommendations for package design, targeting, and marketing.

**Methods and tools:** Python, pandas, scikit-learn, statsmodels, Tableau, classification, forecasting, segmentation, conjoint analysis, and A/B testing.

**Selected work:**

- Built classification models to identify guests likely to purchase a premium Stay & Play package.
- Forecasted 2026 EPS for Marriott and Hilton using historical annual EPS data and Python-based forecasting methods.
- Analyzed guest segments and translated model output into targeting recommendations.
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Lightcast Job Postings Analytics — Boston University

Analyzed large-scale job posting data to understand trends across companies, locations, career areas, and salary patterns. The project emphasized scalable data analysis and business-focused communication.

**Methods and tools:** PySpark, Spark SQL, Python, Plotly, Matplotlib, Jupyter Notebook, GitHub.

**Selected work:**

- Queried and transformed large job-posting tables using PySpark and Spark SQL.
- Created summary tables and visualizations to communicate labor-market insights.
- Connected technical findings to business recommendations for workforce and job-market analysis.
:::

::: {.project-card}
### School Operations Digitization — Jirasat Wittaya School

Led a school-wide digitization initiative for a K-12 institution in Thailand, improving financial records, student data management, billing workflows, and ERP-related operations.

**Selected impact:**

- Improved accuracy of financial records by identifying duplicate entries and unclassified data.
- Delivered estimated cost savings of US$38,000 through financial data correction and process improvement.
- Supported an annual cost saving of approximately US$30,000 by redesigning student lunch operations.
- Coordinated with engineers, teachers, and administrators to customize ERP features for attendance, lesson planning, and student-card payments.
:::

## Side Projects & Activities

::: {.project-grid}

::: {.project-card}
### Project Leader — Accounting Smile 14

**Kasetsart University | Jul 2016 – Jan 2017**

Led 90 volunteers to build a playground for a rural school in Ayutthaya and raised US$2,000 through faculty and company sponsorships.
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Teaching Assistant — Photography

**Ella.bkk**

Assisted photography classes by guiding students on camera operation and the fundamentals of film photography.
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Personal Interests

Golf, photography, hiking, travel, and camping.
:::

:::
